rationale: The V4.4 completion slice now proves the repo-native next-version baseline end to end: the repo can discover from live inputs, align through docs and deck, operate a weekly PM autopilot, and route follow-through through the score-refresh loop without overstating the remaining hardening work.
next_action: Promote ProductOS to V4.4.0 stable via the Ralph-gated release command.
known_gaps: Agent adapter parity remains 4 out of 5 until a non-Codex host is verified directly.
Agentic market intelligence remains 4 out of 5 until unattended refresh and broader distribution proof are added.
deferred_items: Run the first non-Codex adapter parity cycle next.
Harden unattended market-refresh proof before broadening the market-intelligence claim surface.
